message:
chore(beads): file new backlog items from NEXT_STEPS_PLAN follow-up + tick status on 2 existing

Routine br sync flush capturing the next round of backlog items
opened after reviewing NEXT_STEPS_PLAN.md (7c3c782). The additions
turn the high-level workstreams in the plan doc into individually
actionable beads so `br ready` / `bv triage` can surface them.

Highlights among the new rows (diff is ~64 new issues, sampled):
- bd-0cy: optimal-transport revision selection (Wasserstein-1 /
  Sinkhorn) as a workstream-0 formalization option.
- bd-0fh: online learning from --review accept/reject feedback,
  local-only.
- bd-145: release-plz / git-cliff automation for CHANGELOG +
  version bumps (workstream-1 "Ship" deliverable).

Two existing issues tick forward (updated_at only):
- bd-19l: insta snapshot regression suite scope refined.

No source changes.
